[[Category:Ethics]]
[[sn:Prohibitions]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Prohibitions]][[sn:Prohibitions]]prohibitions are things which are ethically banned

The term comes from the Fiqh term Haraam. Although the overlap in what falls in the category is small between Lifeism and [[Islam]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
